# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-docker-builder
  namespace: build
  labels:
    app: docker-builder
    team: ci-cd
    environment: build
spec:
  serviceAccountName: ci-cd-builder
  restartPolicy: Never
  containers:
    - name: docker-builder
      image: docker:27.1-dind
      command:
        - dockerd-entrypoint.sh
      args: []
      securityContext:
        privileged: true
        runAsUser: 0
        runAsGroup: 0
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
        capabilities:
          add:
            - SYS_ADMIN
            - NET_ADMIN
          drop:
            - ALL
      env:
        - name: DOCKER_HOST
          value: "unix:///var/run/docker.sock"
        - name: DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR
          value: ""
        - name: DOCKER_BUILDKIT
          value: "1"
      ports:
        - name: docker
          containerPort: 2375
          protocol: TCP
        - name: docker-tls
          containerPort: 2376
          protocol: TCP
      volumeMounts:
        - name: docker-sock
          mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
        - name: docker-storage
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
        - name: docker-config
          mountPath: /root/.docker/config.json
          subPath: config.json
          readOnly: true
        - name: workspace
          mountPath: /workspace
      resources:
        requests:
          cpu: "500m"
          memory: "1Gi"
          ephemeral-storage: "10Gi"
        limits:
          cpu: "2"
          memory: "4Gi"
          ephemeral-storage: "50Gi"
      readinessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 5
        periodSeconds: 10
        timeoutSeconds: 5
        failureThreshold: 3
      livenessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 30
        timeoutSeconds: 5
        failureThreshold: 5
  volumes:
    - name: docker-sock
      hostPath:
        path: /var/run/docker.sock
        type: Socket
    - name: docker-storage
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: "50Gi"
    - name: docker-config
      secret:
        secretName: docker-registry-credentials
        items:
          - key: .dockerconfigjson
            path: config.json
    - name: workspace
      persistentVolumeClaim:
        claimName: ci-cd-workspace-pvc
  tolerations:
    - key: "dedicated"
      operator: "Equal"
      value: "ci-cd"
      effect: "NoSchedule"
  nodeSelector:
    node-role.kubernetes.io/build: "true"
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
  activeDeadlineSeconds: 3600
